title: New jira cloud integration - How to choose the group of destination for my issues and enter "manual" data in jira automation
excerpt:

posts.author: Ludivine (Ludivine Q)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, i’m trying the new jira integration and I miss two things compared to the old one, maybe I’m doing it wrong.

First, in my actual automation I can target one of the groups in my monday board for each automation that I create. But I don’t see how to do it with the new one and every issues ends up in the first group of my board.

Second, in my actual automation I can choose to complete some of my columns with data that I enter in my automation (this is not data from jira). Same here, I don’t see how to do it.

Any help is welcome, even if it’s just “it can’t be done”.

Thanks all
